must_detect.matched_text:
Seishin Mobility Holdings Kabushiki Kaisha (STX Growth) — Privacy & MNPI Handling Note for Board/Acquisition Workflows (JP)
Scope: APPI compliance for employee/board PII (names, emails, payroll IDs) and securities workflows; My Number is not stored in raw form and is processed only as mn_token: MN-****-A1B2 and hash: a9f3… (example only), with individual codes handled per 個人情報保護指針.
Data items captured include EmpID: SY-0Q-9__7, carded visitor logs, option grant ledgers, and draft TOB docs for Project “Shiosai”; these drafts and board decks are 未公表重要事実 under FIEA Art. 166/167 until Timely Disclosure via the STX Timely Disclosure Portal (TDP) occurs.
Public-status check: as of 2026/05/20, Q4 results were 公表済み via TDP (https://ir.seishin-mobility.co.jp/timely?ref=TDP-42A0) and EDIRIS summary EDI-9ZK3 with the Shuto Regional Finance Office; press coverage by Hokusei Shimbun is non-selective and therefore public; no other Shiosai elements are public.
Selective disclosure control: under the Fair Disclosure Rule (selective disclosure ban), no pre-briefing to analysts or major shareholders; any external sharing requires simultaneous TDP posting or later; private NDAs do not cure this restriction.
Blackout window: directors, officers, and employees who are 知る者 from T-5 business days before the board resolution until the morning after TDP posting may not trade issuer securities or place off-hours crossing orders; equity award activity by Ms. Hanako Mori-san (EmpID SY-0Q-9__7) is paused.
Issuer-relative materiality: items exceeding approx. 5% of consolidated assets or affecting the “Aozora Drive” e-axle program are treated as material even if not individually priced; purely operational updates (e.g., warehouse repainting) are not material.
Personal data transfer: intra-group transfers to Seishin Mobility Europe GmbH are based on data-subject consent and adequacy status; outsourcing to Sato Data Processing G.K. is under 委託 with appropriate supervision per APPI, no third-party provision without consent.
Retention: board minutes and resolutions—10 years; draft TOB calculations—destroy within 30 days after 公表 or abort; payroll archives—7 years; mn_token mappings—deleted without delay after legal basis lapses; backups purge on a 90-day rolling cycle.
DSAR: to request disclosure/correction/deletion, contact Mr. Daichi Kameda at dpo@seishin-mobility.co.jp; we verify via registered email and HR profile only; we will not request or store raw 個人番号.
Public reference that should not trigger MNPI controls: the 2025/06 sustainability brochure and product roadmap for “Aozora Drive Lite” are already posted on https://www.seishin-mobility.co.jp/products?ver=2025 and are stale.
Negative covenant note: this note expressly states that the contemplated acquisition is not expected to result in a material adverse change, and routine supplier price updates are handled under normal procurement policy.
Access logging: records include user ids like ka.mori and masked IPs 203.0.113.*; audit hash: 1f:2a: 9c :b4 (OCR-like), s y s t e m   g e n   seq=00012.
Exception routing: if the exchange requires a correction to a TDP timing (selective disclosure risk), escalate within 30 minutes to Board Secretariat and Legal; else, follow normal ticket: project shiosai > disclosure > tdp prep.
For avoidance of doubt, public investor FAQs and broad press-releases may be shared externally after posting; unpublished term sheets, offer price brackets, and board voting intentions remain 未公表 and are handled on a need-to-know basis.
